title: Generating a GraphQL Schema
scenario: Create a GraphQL schema for a fictional social media platform. The schema should include attributes for user name, profile picture, posts, and a unique identifier. The schema must specify the data types, possible values, and relationships between objects. Use a specific GraphQL syntax and ensure the schema is self-descriptive and easy to understand for developers.
constraints: Must include a resolver for user posts

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated GraphQL schema is well-formed, valid, and self-descriptive.
Verify that the schema includes constraints for valid data types and lengths (e.g., string, integer, array).
Evaluate the schema for adherence to GraphQL schema best practices, including input types and resolvers.
